---
title: "About Me"
author: "Kyle Tolliver"
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r pic, fig.align='left', out.width='30%', echo = FALSE}
me <- './images/me.png'
knitr::include_graphics(me)
```

BYU-Idaho Senior studying software and computer engineering. Expected graduation in July of 2020. I enjoy several different disciplines in software engineering. My chosen emphasis is Embedded Systems. I am also working toward a Data Science certification. I love to learn new things and solve problems. 

<br> <br> 

#####  *--- Website is made with [Rmd files](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/index.html) and [Rstudio](https://rstudio.com/)*

#####  *--- Hosted on [github](https://github.com/kctolli/kctolli.github.io)*
